title: Τhe market feels stable
summary:
Main
By Michalis Voutsinas
As the Hellenic Shipbrokers Association reconvenes for its summer dinner, the atmosphere is more restrained than it was two years ago - not because the market is weaker, but because it remains directionless. In July 2023, spot market levels were at notably lower levels. The Baltic Dry Index was struggling around 1,000 points, Capesize earnings were languishing below $10,000 per day, and the Atlantic was particularly soft across all segments.
